_comment: Frozen reproducible-node environment lock for the ApprenticeOps model-list run. run.py --preflight reads this and REFUSES to start unless the live node matches (or you pass --allow-unlocked). It exists because an earlier controlled run (Turbo OFF, RAPL package-0) and a later one (Turbo ON, RAPL psys/package-0 mixed) drifted: the later run was launched without scripts/node-power.sh setup, so a prior run's teardown trap had restored Turbo and RAPL_DOMAIN was unpinned, and none of it was recorded. This manifest + the env.* provenance run.py stamps make the node's power/energy regime explicit and enforceable so it can't recur.
name: apprenticeops-run-env-v1
frozen_from: the controlled Turbo-off run, 2026-06-17..18, launched via scripts/node-power.sh setup

cpu._comment: Set by scripts/node-power.sh setup. no_turbo=1 disables Turbo Boost; min=max=100 perf_pct pins to the non-turbo BASE clock (i5-8350U = 1.70 GHz). wave1 observed freq ceiling 1708 MHz; wave2 (turbo on) reached 3602 MHz.

energy._comment: RAPL domain MUST be pinned. package-0 = CPU package only (what wave1 used, 100%). psys = whole-SoC (reads higher; 760 wave2 rows used it -> not comparable). Pin via RAPL_DOMAIN=package-0.

telemetry._comment: perf counters must be readable for membw.series + perf.core. wave2 silently lost these on ~14% of runs (perf_event_paranoid too high or perf unavailable). Require paranoid<=2.

model_runtime._comment: Ollama options applied per request. num_ctx is the run.py NUM_CTX constant.

protocol._comment: The decode protocol the preflight asserts (temp 0.7, seed_base 1, reps 5, think=false) plus the scenarios.json content hash, so a stray --temp/--think or an edited prompt aborts instead of silently producing off-protocol data. scenario_count 24 = the original 19 + 5 merged (3 prompt-injection + 2 tool-call). NB: run.py pins only temp/seed/num_predict/num_ctx; each model's other sampler defaults (top_p/top_k/...) are captured in ollama.parameters, not pinned.

expected._comment: Ollama engine pinned from the home-ai node (hostname 'ai') on 2026-06-24; run.py stamps env.ollama_version into every row and the preflight refuses to run if the node's engine drifts from this. Re-pin only on a deliberate, reviewed engine upgrade.

models_pinned._comment: If true, the preflight requires EVERY model in --models to be present locally before the sweep starts (no mid-run pull_failed like wave2's 133). Pre-pull with: while read m; do [ -n "$m" ] && ollama pull "$m"; done < data/models.txt
